Barbed Dragonscale Pauldrons  
 


Slot: SHOULDERS
AC: 9
STR: +5 STA: +10 AGI: +9
SV POISON: +15
WT: 2.5 Size: MEDIUM
Class: ALL except DRU NEC WIZ MAG ENC
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Barbed Dragonscale Pauldrons

Slot: SHOULDERS
AC: 9
STR: +5 STA: +10 AGI: +9
SV POISON: +15
WT: 2.5 Size: MEDIUM
Class: ALL except DRU NEC WIZ MAG ENC
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Item Type:Armor
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:7 pp 5 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Tribute:1366
Submitted By:Tanarel Wildfire
Lucy Entry By:rale
Item Updated By:Gidono
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-02 11:11:10
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Average Price: 1,000pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 50

This item is the result of a quest.

ARO
QuoteReply
# Jun 10 2003 at 3:42 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591784275730
19 posts
Just bought these for 500pp on ARO and than an hour later 2 people were selling for 7K. I figure I got a good deal at 500pp.

RE: ARO
QuoteReply
# Jul 07 2004 at 1:10 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592255930943
720 posts
yeah u did.
▲ Page top
Heads-F.Y.I.
QuoteReply
# Mar 25 2003 at 12:28 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1695600986541
Scholar
63 posts
Just completed the quest again about 10 minutes ago, on the Brell Serilis server. Not only dropping are "Greater Dragon's Head" dropping, but also "Great Dragon's Head," which many people have asked about. I said ***** it, turned it in, and viola! got myself a new pair of Barbed Dragonscale Boots. SO, the quest will work with the "Great" as well as the "Greater."
Hope this helps everyone with the question regarding what is turned in for and what the head was for. Myself, I've been wondering for a while, I've always seen "Lesser" and "Greater" but wasn't sure on the "Great," and I've built up a few of these as I hit up WW a good twice a week duo'ing shaman/warrior. Hopefully that helps you on the head questions, and good luck all.
▲ Page top
key
QuoteReply
# Feb 12 2003 at 12:43 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592757397175
217 posts
you can kill a dragon in sky shrine to get the key to Cobalt Scar, which can also be quested for from the same mob, so i guess this is kind of the same idea.
▲ Page top
Bst Usable
QuoteReply
# Jan 07 2003 at 5:36 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593362324698
6 posts
These are Bst usable. I know because my 56 Bst wears them.
▲ Page top
Pricing
QuoteReply
# Nov 18 2002 at 7:15 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1596385254478
11 posts
If you managed to get these for 400pp-2000pp then all I can say is 'DAMN!' I've only once seen these go for less than 8000pp on AB in the Bazaar (and that I think was someone who must have farmed the quest giver - he was selling about 6 of them for 6500pp each) - so I guess at least on these my server price is seriously screwed up :/
▲ Page top
Kyenka Drops
QuoteReply
# Jun 09 2002 at 12:23 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592759359229
2 posts
Last night we had 3 groups hunting in the Tormax area for faction and we killed Kyenka, he dropped the pauldrons. Either someone messed up their quest and gave the pauldrons to him or he does drop the gear that he gives out from quests. FYI

Fooleechow
Grandmaster of Prexus
▲ Page top
RE: Kyenka Drops
QuoteReply
# Jun 26 2002 at 6:12 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592757218364
Scholar
34 posts
that's correct, killing this mob will normally get you one of the quested items, same for the mob that gives the Frostbringer. So, if you didn't have a Greater Dragon head and wanted these shoulders, a Frostbringer, or the boots, kill the quest mobs, good chances you'll get one.
▲ Page top
Just bought these on 4/16/2002...
QuoteReply
# Apr 17 2002 at 3:25 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591776360525
2 posts
On Brell for 2000pp. As a monk, these are a tremendous upgrade from the ever-popular Drolvarg Mantle, the extra 1.0 weight is worth the extra stats; and on my monk (Level 35) it also added 21 HP and 17 AC. So, for 2000pp; seemed like a good deal to me. That's all.
▲ Page top
ok here is the thing
QuoteReply
# Apr 16 2002 at 11:45 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591777428224
27 posts
why get this when u can get a frost bringer w/ the head hehe any one who does this should get smacked.(another case where ammo solves the prob)
▲ Page top
RE: ok here is the thing
QuoteReply
# Jun 26 2002 at 6:19 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592757218364
Scholar
34 posts
well the Frostbringers aren't that great anymore, weather you're farming them or need one. Like the other person that replied to this post, I need the hp, and for the stamina challanged, 10 sta is very nice. So it really just depends on what you're looking for. They don't weigh that much so monks might be interested in them. Sure they're not Uber if you compair them to the really high end items but these are very attainable. Two groups of 55+ folks can take down the dragons in WW. I've done it with 1 group. I'm quite happy that I finally got a pair.
▲ Page top
RE: ok here is the thing
QuoteReply
# May 05 2002 at 7:48 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591766341207
23 posts
I got a frostbringer =)

If I get another greater head, you bet I am getting these pauldrons. That's 60hps on a level 60 warrior from the stamina!

Sure I could sell the FB and get another one, but plat don't mean squat when you are working on getting as many hps as you can

pauldrons
QuoteReply
# Mar 30 2002 at 9:28 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591776856929
31 posts
seriously this should only be 5k or less no matter if the quest is tough or not, this item is not uber it is decent i would say
▲ Page top
Why is this so good?
QuoteReply
# Dec 01 2001 at 8:21 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592247341293
Scholar
42 posts
The stats don't seem amazing.
▲ Page top
RE: Why is this so good?
QuoteReply
# Apr 20 2002 at 7:04 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1717373788612
View User Forum
Scholar
485 posts
HERE IT IS 4AGI=1AC not that good considering but agi also helps your dodge/block/piposte/defense skills increase very slightly faster but that takes a lot of agi
▲ Page top
RE: Why is this so good?
QuoteReply
# Apr 14 2002 at 1:30 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591758883995
12 posts
9 AC, 9 AGI.... Monks get AC from agility. And has anyone done a lot of checking on monk shoulder items? No? Well, it's a major pain to get AC in the shoulder slot. Not sure about other classes but this is probably the best droppable shoulder slot item for monkies. Only other contender is Engraved Bone Pauldrons which is 12AC but only 5AGI. Also 3DEX and -20CHA. These puppies have no negative charisma and toss in 10STA, 5STR, and 15SP. Depending on how much AC monkies get from AGI, these could be by far the winner. If there are any monkies out there that DO know how much AC they'd get from 9AGI, please post. Rather interested in finding out. :)
▲ Page top
RE: Why is this so good?
QuoteReply
# Jan 30 2002 at 8:37 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591761195679
203 posts
Very good stamina on these which is a hard stat to raise. For an elf or iksar, it is difficult to get stamina to the magic number of 100. Even beyond that, it adds HP.

17k seems a bit high to me too, though.
▲ Page top
WW...
QuoteReply
# Nov 24 2001 at 4:02 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591766408794
32 posts
You can kill a good portion of the dragons with a full group of 59/60's. As long as you have some dummy buffs and a few right clickable buffs (like Jboots, Gobbie Earring) you'll be fine.
